arts.ttl: John McGinn targets Scotland all time goals record as he reveals Ally McCoist wind-up
arts.sum: The Tartan Army hero jumped to fifth in the charts after his two goals in the last international break moved him onto 20 for his country

arts.ttl: John McGinn gives verdict on Marcus Rashford after Man Utd saga - 'That's when you know'
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford left Manchester United under a cloud in January after falling out of favour with boss Ruben Amorim before sealing a loan move to Aston Villa where he is rediscovering his form

arts.ttl: George Hirst didn't think twice about Scotland call-up as new boy reveals Three Lions dad approved nation switch
arts.sum: The Ipswich Town frontman has been called into the squad after switching his international allegiance from England
